title: Inside the Second Impact
wikitext:
[]: Inside the Second Impact             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:00 am Did anyone know what they have to do with Adam in the 2I? Turn Adam to be awaken ? Or extract its tissue for the production of Evangelions?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Apr 18, 2010 9:30 am They were conducting a Contact Experiment between Adam and an unidentified human subject, apparently after infecting Adam with this human's DNA. This resulted in the creation of Kaworu and in Adam's going out of control resulting in Second Impact. Seele knew this would happen and recalled Gendo to keep him alive. Adam exploded after destroying Antarctica but before she could destroy the entire world apparently because of something that had been done to her, either the human DNA, the shoulder restraints, or something that had been done to the Lance while it was being studied at a base near the Dead Sea.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Apr 20, 2010 5:43 pm This is the first I've heard of 'making Kaworu caused second impact', I was under the impression that Second Impact started when someone had the bright idea of removing the Lancea Longinus from Adam, thus she woke up and began terraforming, right up until they stuck the lancea back in her which reverted her to the embryonic state...or is that wrong?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Tue Apr 20, 2010 7:07 pm ^No, the Lance had been long since removed.^ Episode 21 wrote: OLD MAN C: What about the Lance of Longinus? MAN A: It's been sitting there since it was shipped here last week from the Dead Sea. OLD MAN B: It will be treated before it's sent underground, won't it? Are we okay on that? MAN E: The contact experiment with the donor is scheduled for the 13th of next month.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Apr 20, 2010 7:49 pm thewayneiac wrote: Sticking it back in as a part of the Contact Experiment/DNA injection somehow revived her allowing her to start the re-formatting process. They tried to stop her by pulling it back out to no avail.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Tue Apr 20, 2010 11:13 pm Well, at least that answers the question of how Adam's soul got in a human body...up until this point I'd just sort of assumed SEELE 'found' it floating around somewhere, which made no sense.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Apr 21, 2010 11:54 am Teague wrote: Well, at least that answers the question of how Adam's soul got in a human body...

[]: Inside the Second Impact             Quote Post by edmundasBakashinji » Sun Apr 18, 2010 8:00 am Did anyone know what they have to do with Adam in the 2I? Turn Adam to be awaken ? Or extract its tissue for the production of Evangelions?

[]:             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Sun Apr 18, 2010 9:30 am They were conducting a Contact Experiment between Adam and an unidentified human subject, apparently after infecting Adam with this human's DNA. This resulted in the creation of Kaworu and in Adam's going out of control resulting in Second Impact. Seele knew this would happen and recalled Gendo to keep him alive. Adam exploded after destroying Antarctica but before she could destroy the entire world apparently because of something that had been done to her, either the human DNA, the shoulder restraints, or something that had been done to the Lance while it was being studied at a base near the Dead Sea.
